Qworum's RDF vocabularies

Ontologies

qrmm
A general-purpose ontology.

Prose annotations

Prose annotations are useful for translating RDF statements into human prose, which is understandable by both LLMs and humans.

rdf and rdfs annotations
Prose annotations for the rdf and rdfs ontologies.
foaf annotations
Prose annotations for the foaf ontology.
bio annotations
Prose annotations for the bio ontology.
rel annotations
Prose annotations for the rel ontology.
